1795940.name: Blaston Soundtrack Vol. 1
1795940.description: The Blaston Official Soundtrack is finally here! Featuring tunes from the Ozo Lounge, the single player campaign and the main theme from our launch trailer. Stream it on the platform of your choice, and enjoy the synths brought to life from our competitive VR shooter! The soundtrack is published by Resolution Games and made by Linus Söderlund & Magnus Walterstad.
